title: ParsedGameGuide
description: Output produced by the parse-guide agent for a single text walkthrough. Maps 1:1 to the on-disk structure under apps/game-guides/app/data/markdown/{gameId}/.

gameId.description: Kebab-case slug used as the directory name under markdown/. Inferred from the guide title or input filename.

gameTitle.description: Human-readable game title as found in the guide header.

order.description: 0-indexed position in the sections array. Must equal the array index.

id.description: Step file name (without .md). Kebab-case derived from title; suffix -2, -3, ... on collisions within a section.

order.description: 0-indexed position within the parent section's steps array. Must equal the array index.

optional.description: True when the source marked the step as optional (e.g., a '(OPTIONAL)' suffix on the title).

automatic.description: True when the step requires no player action (cutscene, forced progression).

parent.description: Step id of a parent step, when nested. Null for top-level steps.

content.description: Cleaned step body. Plain text with markdown extensions: headers, bold, list items, code fences around preserved ASCII tables. Paragraphs separated by blank lines; original hard wrapping preserved.
